title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that the direct comparison itself is the wrong question and positions a "common layer" as more important than choosing between the two tools.
